name: Placement of User into Incorrect Group
description: The product or administrator places a user into an incorrect group that grants more access or privileges than intended, enabling the user to bypass security policies, access unauthorized resources, or perform privileged actions.
detection_pattern: AUTH[user_assignment] places a user into STORAGE[group] that has elevated CONTROL[permissions] without a CONTROL[group_validation] node verifying the assigned group matches the user's intended access level
